messages.preview: Arthur didn’t take a white shirt, so 🤷‍♀️ I can’t get worked up about things like this! 🤣
I dreamt u blocked two of our toilets and needed to go to my grandpa’s one in stoke
Okay. I’m going to get drunk and disgrace myself!
I imagine it will be ignored until Tuesday… if at all!
